subject: [PATCH 10/13] mm: handle PMD swap entries in UFFDIO_MOVE

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function, move_swap_pmd(), to handle PMD-level swap entries in the UFFDIO_MOVE operation. It allows moving whole PMD swap entries and re-anchors the swap-cache folio's anon rmap to the destination VMA. The patch also introduces a fallback mechanism for split swap-cache folios and preserves single-owner semantics by rejecting non-exclusive PMD swap entries.
